title: Splode's Copper Tools
description: Adds new tools and armor for copper and nothing else!
body:
Splode's Copper Tools adds a variety of new tools that are made using copper. This mod was designed in vanilla+ modpacks in mind as it only adds the new tools and armor and nothing else like many other mods may do which I personally find annoying and it is the reason I have made this mod.

This mod was created with MCreator as I do not know how to code so if there are issues please tell me I am unsure how good the software is but everything should work perfectly.

Currently armor trims are unsupported by MCreator and so I am sorry that they wont work on the armor and I am trying to find a work around.

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a15f5cfc06228e1e8214a38ca4c3d691bae28c2.png)
